prose: The HOMO–LUMO gap for TEMPO in the gas phase was computed as 3.87242 eV using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory with PySCF. Charge: 0, multiplicity: 2 (doublet). The SCF was converged in 12 cycles. This geometry was directly provided (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz), and this calculation did not perform geometry relaxation or implicit solvation. Density fitting was off, so exact integrals were used.
